title: Eria acuminata
taxonomy: Eria acuminata is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family is one of the largest and most diverse in the plant kingdom, containing over 30,000 species. Eria acuminata is further classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is a large and widespread subfamily within the Orchidaceae family. It is also a member of the tribe Gastrodieae, a group of orchids known for their unique and often parasitic relationships with other organisms. Further classification within the tribe places Eria acuminata in the genus Eria, which is a small group of orchids native to tropical Asia.
